label: Comic Noir
globalSuffix: crisp inking, layered cel shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, clean composition, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-length character portrait, head-to-toe, entire figure visible, centered framing, single person, shoes visible
suspect.suffix: graphic-novel mood, strong silhouette, readable face, clean body proportions

evidence.suffix: object-focused composition, readable detail, minimal clutter

featured.suffix: moody investigative atmosphere, scene storytelling, strong focal point

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, low resolution
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, crowd, duplicate person, cropped body, cut-off feet, extra limbs, deformed hands
negativePrompts.evidence: multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, unreadable clue
